description: Share lines for the most recognizable anchor passages. A share line is a verbatim clip of the BSB text, never a paraphrase; the builder rejects any line that is not an exact substring of its chunk.

items.shareLine: For God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son
The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, to give you a future and a hope
in all these things we are more than conquerors through Him who loved us
Be anxious for nothing, but in everything, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God
But those who wait upon the LORD will renew their strength; they will mount up with wings like eagles
Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and lean not on your own understanding
Come to Me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest
Love is patient, love is kind
But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control
Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind
Your kingdom come, Your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven
They are new every morning; great is Your faithfulness!
Now faith is the assurance of what we hope for and the certainty of what we do not see
And what does the LORD require of you but to act justly, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with your God?
My grace is sufficient for you, for My power is perfected in weakness
For it is by grace you have been saved through faith
